meaning: n.科萨人(居住在南非开普省的牧民),科萨人使用的班图语
examples: Two of the main languages here are Xhosa and English.
She could sing while making the epiglottal clicks of the Xhosa language.
They perform most of their songs in Xhosa, songs that talk about their cultures and upbringing.
Though the ANC encompasses all races, it is dominated by members of the Xhosa tribe.
His father was a trader who dealt with blacks, and Donald spoke the local language, Xhosa, fluently.
